# Free Stock Music Attribution

These tracks are third-party music candidates for *Petals in the Dusk*. Keep
this file with the audio assets, and include the required credits in the
player-facing credits before any public build ships.

## Village Ambiance

- File: `village_ambiance_alexander_nakarada.mp3`
- Intended use: Suncrest Hollow town theme candidate
- Creator: Alexander Nakarada (CreatorChords)
- Source: https://www.free-stock-music.com/alexander-nakarada-village-ambiance.html
- License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)
- License URL: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
- SHA-256: `03C8D838BD6473CBB8E3E97879FDC428DF7C88F5ADBFE728E5B5C1509B3EDEB8`

Required attribution:

> Village Ambiance by Alexander Nakarada (CreatorChords) | https://creatorchords.com
>
> Royalty Free Music by https://www.free-stock-music.com
>
> Creative Commons / Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)
>
> https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

## Usage Notes

- Do not upload or distribute these tracks under the project's artist name or
  as standalone music releases.
- Do not use these tracks as backing music for a new musical work.
- Keep the original downloads and source-page evidence in the private license
  archive.
- Recheck credits, source links, and licenses before a public demo build.
